description_long: This is a medium-sized plastic bottle with a matte black screw cap and a two-tone body. The upper portion of the bottle is a muted pink color, while the lower half is a light gray or off-white. The front of the bottle features a rectangular label with the brand name 'Soylent' and additional text, suggesting it is a commercial beverage container. The bottle has a gently contoured shape for ergonomic grip, with a slightly indented neck below the cap. The surface appears smooth and the bottle is likely lightweight, designed for single-hand use and portability.
description: A two-tone pink and gray plastic bottle with a black screw cap and a front label, designed for beverages.
description_view_0: Front view showing the label with 'Soylent' branding and product details, as well as the full shape and color split.
description_view_1: Rear angled view with no visible label, highlighting the smooth, contoured back and the color transition.
description_view_2: Direct rear view showing the bottle's symmetrical shape and the absence of any branding or label.
description_view_3: Side-rear view emphasizing the bottle's ergonomic curves and the clean, label-free surface.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front label with 'Soylent' in gray text on a white background, additional smaller text below, all centered on the front face.
